post.description:
MagicMock is a subclass of Mock with default implementations
of most of the magic methods. You can use MagicMock without having to
configure the magic methods yourself.

If you use the `spec` or `spec_set` arguments then *only* magic
methods that exist in the spec will be created.

Attributes and the return value of a `MagicMock` will also be `MagicMocks`.

get.description: Serve the machine-readable security.txt per RFC 9116.
Human-readable responsible-disclosure policy (JSON).
Hall of fame for security researchers.

schema.title: Response Security Acknowledgments Security Acknowledgments Get

get.description:
Return metadata for a single trace id within a recent window.

This mirrors the aggregation done by `/traces/recent` but scoped to a single
`trace_id`. It searches calls and legacy diagnosis jobs within the last
`days` and returns a `TraceListItem` describing the trace.

post.description:
MagicMock is a subclass of Mock with default implementations
of most of the magic methods. You can use MagicMock without having to
configure the magic methods yourself.

If you use the `spec` or `spec_set` arguments then *only* magic
methods that exist in the spec will be created.

Attributes and the return value of a `MagicMock` will also be `MagicMocks`.

get.description:
Return metadata for a single trace id within a recent window.

This mirrors the aggregation done by `/traces/recent` but scoped to a single
`trace_id`. It searches calls and legacy diagnosis jobs within the last
`days` and returns a `TraceListItem` describing the trace.

methods that exist in the spec will be created.

Attributes and the return value of a `MagicMock` will also be `MagicMocks`.

schema.title: Response List Diagnoses Api V1 Diagnosis Get
Response List Diagnosis Pr Links Api V1 Diagnosis  Diagnosis Id  Prs Get

plan_template.title: Plan Template
plan_template.description: Canonical entitlement template for the current plan_code. Module 6's resolver may override individual values; this is the baseline.

week_start.title: Week Start
week_start.description: ISO date — the Monday of the week

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: Parsed summary_json; {} when not yet populated

html_blob.title: Html Blob
html_blob.description: Pre-rendered HTML email body; null when not yet rendered

sent_at.title: Sent At
sent_at.description: ISO timestamp; null = queued / not yet sent

median_time_to_resolution_hours_delta.title: Median Time To Resolution Hours Delta

payload.title: Payload
payload.description: Parsed payload_json; {} when missing or corrupt

PilotPolicyPayload.title: PilotPolicyPayload
PilotPolicyPayload.description:
Strongly-typed mirror of the policy_json schema (plan §6.3).

Defaults intentionally mirror `services.pilot.DEFAULT_POLICY` so a
caller can omit any field and have it default to the canonical value.

ProviderKeyResponse.title: ProviderKeyResponse
ProviderKeyResponse.description:
Metadata-only wire shape. The dashboard renders identity using
`key_fingerprint` (first 8 chars) + `key_last4`.
